{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Archlord technique
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Archlord technique]] pulsed in [[Yan Shoumei]]'s body.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
